description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Tests that runs on every push and pull request. The workflow consists of two jobs: Linting and Linux. The Linting job checks out the repository, sets up Python 3.10.13, installs pre-commit, and runs linting on all files. The Linux job depends on Linting, sets up a matrix of Python 3.10.13 on ubuntu-latest, installs dependencies, runs tests with pytest, generates a coverage report, and uploads it to Codecov.
